title: PAW - Napkins 3-Ply (33 x 33 cm) I 20 Pieces I Perfect for Birthdays, Parties, Weddings, Communion and Celebrations I Paper Napkins Colorful - Flowers, Spring, Summer, Meadow i Color: Flax Plants
features: Napkin made of 3-layer silk Paper with a weight of 16 g/m², FSC and Ecolabel-certified, manufactured in Europe
Dimensions 33 x 33 cm, pack contents 20 pieces. The napkins are printed with environmentally friendly water-based inks.

The product has a certificate issued by the Institute for National Health that shows that our products can come into contact with food and are environmentally friendly and meet the requirements of BFR XXXVI.
The napkins are printed with environmentally friendly colors on a water-based inks.
Napkins ideal for everyday use and for special occasions such as birthdays, name days, garden festivals, family celebrations, parties with friends
description: From the manufacturer Wild and colorful paper napkins are an excellent choice for various occasions A pattern that follows the wild flowers trend and takes us with its design to nature, away from the hustle and bustle of the city. Natural materials and wild flowers will allow you to return to childhood, to the recipes of grandmothers and ancient traditions. Amid the bustle of life, a return to the roots and nature is a new definition of luxury. Atmospheric table decoration in colorful color palettes for different occasions Napkins made of 3-ply tissue paper with a weight of 16 g/m², FSC and eco-label, made in Europe. Dimensions 33 x 33 cm, package contents 20 pieces. The napkins are printed with water-based paints. The product was approved by the National Institute of Public Health which proves that our products can come into contact with food and meet the requirements of BFR XXXVI.
